heading: Privacy Policy
body:
## Introduction
This Privacy Policy explains how Aqil Yusri Photography ("we," "us") collects, uses, and protects personal data submitted through this website, in accordance with the Personal Data Protection Act 2010 (PDPA) of Malaysia.
 
## Information We Collect
- Contact details submitted through our contact form (name, email, subject, and message)
- Any information you share with us via WhatsApp or email when inquiring about our services
- Photos and likeness captured during a booked photography session
## How We Use Your Information
We use the information collected to:
- Respond to inquiries and booking requests
- Prepare contracts, invoices, and session details
- Deliver edited photo galleries
- Communicate about your booking (scheduling, reminders, follow-ups)
## Third-Party Services
This website uses the following third-party services, which may process data on our behalf:
- **Netlify** — website hosting and contact form submissions
- **Netlify Identity** — secure login for content management
- **Google Fonts** — loads font files from Google's servers
- **WhatsApp (Meta)** — used for direct client communication via the "Book Now" button
## Photos & Session Data
Photos taken during a session are retained for portfolio and delivery purposes as described in our Terms & Conditions. Clients may request that specific photos be removed from public portfolio or social media use at any time by contacting us directly.
 
## Data Retention
We retain contact and booking information only as long as necessary to fulfil the purposes outlined above, or as required by law.
 
## Your Rights Under PDPA
You have the right to:
- Access the personal data we hold about you
- Request correction of inaccurate data
- Request deletion of your personal data, subject to legal or contractual obligations
## Cookies
This website does not currently use tracking cookies or analytics. This section will be updated if that changes.
 
## Contact Us
For any privacy-related requests or questions, contact us at hello@aqilyusri.com.
